title: Inception
description: A thief enters dreams to steal secrets, then gets a chance at redemption.

title: Interstellar
description: Explorers travel through a wormhole in space to save humanity.

title: Walampoori- Seven and Half Dreams
description: Five village con men join a traveling performance group as cover. A fake priest recruits them to pose as businessmen in a scheme to purchase two Walampooris.

title: Father
description: Father is a 2026 Sri Lankan Sinhala gangster film directed by Chaminda Jayasuriya and produced by Dr. Shantha Geethadeva for Emica Productions. The film is based on a series of true events revolved around the gangster Gampaha Osmond, that occurred between the 1976 and 1991 in Sri Lanka.
